name: Everything Blockchain, Inc.
business: The Company is primarily engaged in the business of consulting and developing data management, blockchain and cybersecurity related solutions. Its lines of business are EB Advise, BuildDB and EB Control. The business model is based on building recurring revenue through software subscriptions, licensing agreements, and transaction fees.

exposures.sentence: The Company, which is headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, is primarily engaged in the business of consulting and developing data management, blockchain and cybersecurity related solutions.
The Company, which is headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, is primarily engaged in the business of consulting and developing data management, blockchain and cybersecurity related solutions.
We are a technology company that is blending blockchain, zero-trust, and database management technology to create a platform to solve real world, practical business problems.
EB Control is a patented ZTDA solution for individuals and organizations seeking continuous control of their data across its lifespan.
DataStone has developed many innovations in the areas of distributed computing, artificial intelligence and blockchain technologies.

An example of this is BuildDB for environmental, social, and governance. This application receives data from sensors in real time that are monitoring greenhouse gas emissions from equipment involved with the production of oil and gas.

catalysts.sentence: On January 5, 2024, we launched EB Control Enterprise to the general market.
On October 31, 2023, the Board of Directors approved, and the Company completed, the sale of Mercury to Chris Carter, founder and CEO of Mercury.

catalysts.event: Expected receipt of employee retention credit refund
catalysts.sentence: On July 14, 2023, a board director of the Company loaned it $55,000, representing half of the Company s employee retention credit refund, which the Company expects to receive during the year ending January 31, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Blockchain market projected to reach $39.7 billion by 2025 at 67.3% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Markets and Markets, the blockchain market size was valued at $1.4 billion in 2020 and is projected to reach $39.7 billion by 2025, at a compound annual growth rate ( CAGR ) of 67.3% during the forecast period 2020-2025.

tamClaims.claim: Next-generation database market projected to reach $43 billion by 2025 at 28% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: Market research shows that the global next-generation database market is projected to reach $43 billion by 2025, with a CAGR of 28%.

tamClaims.claim: Zero Trust security market projected to reach $49.81 billion by 2025 at 40.8% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Markets and Markets, the Zero Trust security market was valued at $9.32 billion in 2020 and is projected to reach $49.81 billion by 2025, at a CAGR of 40.8% during the forecast period 2020-2025.

tamClaims.claim: Combined addressable market of more than $700 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: These combine for a projected addressable market of more than $700 billion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: BuildDB enables access to a $100 billion addressable market
tamClaims.sentence: It is the foundation upon which we and our customers will build an application ecosystem and allows us to access and disrupt a $100 billion addressable market.
